title: Breed your guppies
description: Raise the next generation of fish among dense plants.

dialogue.text: Guppies multiply quickly. Dense plants like hornwort and guppy grass keep the fry safe right in the main tank.
Once the fry are born, feed them crushed flakes several times a day so they grow quickly.
When they're large enough not to be eaten, just enjoy watching them join the community tank.
